title: Behavior Circle Around Anchor
description: Allows the mob to move in a circle around a point or a target.

goal_radius.description: Distance in blocks at which the entity is considered to have reached the goal.

oneOf.description: Range [min, max] of height above the target.

height_above_target_range.description: Height above the target to maintain.

height_change_chance.description: Chance per tick to change height (out of 1000).

oneOf.description: Range [min, max] of the random height offset.

height_offset_range.description: Random vertical offset applied to the entity.

radius_change_chance.description: Chance per tick to change the circle radius (out of 1000).

oneOf.description: Range [min, max] of the random circle radius in blocks.
